stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 4444, a wake turbulence non-radar separation minima of 3 minutes shall be applied to…

options.a: LIGHT aircraft taking-off behind a MEDIUM aircraft when aircraft are using the same runway.
options.b: MEDIUM aircraft landing behind a HEAVY aircraft.
options.c: LIGHT aircraft landing behind a MEDIUM aircraft.
options.d: LIGHT aircraft taking-off behind a MEDIUM aircraft from a parallel runway separated by less than 760 m. (using whole runway).
